title: Bee Dance
description: Adds a waggle dance that allows bees with flowers to tell other flowerless bees where a flower is.
body:
# Bee Dance This mod adds a waggle dance that allows bees with flowers to tell flowerless bees where to find flowers. It also adds a headbutt behavior that occurs when a bee that has a flower interrupts a dancing bee whose flower is significantly further away.
